prompt: Complete this multi-step workflow: 1) Use echo to confirm you are starting the workflow with message 'Starting multi-tool workflow'. 2) Get weather for New York and Los Angeles using get-structured-content. 3) Use get-sum to add their temperatures together. 4) Use get-annotated-message with messageType 'success' and includeImage false to generate a success message. 5) Finally, use echo to report a summary like 'Workflow complete: NY temp [X], LA temp [Y], combined [Z], success message generated'.
